name: Asparagus Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a casserole dish.
2. Put a layer of asparagus on the bottom.
3. Add soup over the asparagus.
4. Sprinkle mushrooms evenly over the soup.
5. Distribute half the cheese over the mushrooms.
6. Place another layer of asparagus on top.
7. Finish with a layer of cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes, or until bubbly.
9. Remove from oven and sprinkle onion rings on top.
10. Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
